---
title: "Thesis Research Portal"
subtitle: "Exploring [Your Research Topic]"
---

## Welcome

This website documents my thesis research on [your topic]. Here you'll find:

- **Data Analysis**: Computational notebooks in Python, R, and GIS
- **Visualizations**: Interactive maps and plots
- **Writing**: Research findings and literature reviews
- **Code**: Reproducible analysis scripts

## Latest Updates

::: {.callout-note}
## Recent Work
- Added new GIS analysis of [topic]
- Updated Python clustering algorithm
- Published literature review on [subject]
:::

## Quick Links

- [Research Overview](research/index.qmd)
- [About This Project](about.qmd)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/yourusername/thesis-website)

---

*Last updated: `{r} Sys.Date()`*
